en_title: Microsoft Has Reportedly Shut Down South of Midnight Developer Compulsion Games
cn_title: 微软据报关闭《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion Games
subtitle: 利润率仅3%
opus_summary: 微软据报关闭Compulsion Games，裁员超90人。新任Xbox负责人Sharma警告公司重置，披露游戏业务利润率仅3%。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft is reportedly planning to shut down South of Midnight and We Happy Few developer Compulsion Games.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，微软计划关闭《午夜之南》和《少数幸运儿》的开发商Compulsion Games。

paragraphs.en: Kotaku reports that the layoffs may total more than 90 staff, just months after the Canadian studio was advertising jobs for a new IP. Microsoft has yet to comment. Compulsion Games also developed 2013’s Contrast.
paragraphs.cn: Kotaku报道称，裁员人数可能超过90人，而就在数月前，这家加拿大工作室还在为新IP招聘。微软尚未置评。Compulsion Games还开发了2013年的《Contrast》。

paragraphs.en: In an update, Kotaku said one source indicated Compulsion leadership is in "negotiations" with Microsoft over the studio’s fate. It is not known where these negotiations may lead. IGN has asked Microsoft for comment.
paragraphs.cn: 在后续更新中，Kotaku称一位消息人士表示，Compulsion领导层正与微软就工作室的命运进行「谈判」。目前尚不清楚这些谈判会走向何方。IGN已请微软置评。

paragraphs.en: The news comes just hours after it emerged that head of Xbox Game Studios Craig Duncan and chief of staff Louise O'Connor had left Microsoft after decades at the company .
paragraphs.cn: 此消息传出仅数小时前，有报道称Xbox游戏工作室负责人Craig Duncan和幕僚长Louise O'Connor在效力公司数十年后离开了微软。

paragraphs.en: South of Midnight, an action adventure game set in a fictionalized American Deep South, launched in April 2025 and while it was well-received by critics, it failed to find a significant audience. It launched on PlayStation 5 and Nintendo Switch 2 in March.
paragraphs.cn: 《午夜之南》是一款设定在虚构的美国深南部的动作冒险游戏，于2025年4月发售。虽然获得了评论界的好评，却未能找到大量受众。该作于3月登陆了PS5和任天堂Switch 2。

paragraphs.en: Just last week, new Xbox boss Asha Sharma warned of a company "reset" that most took as a signal that Microsoft planned big layoffs and studio closures. "the studios most exposed are brilliant for prestige and rotten for the spreadsheet." Microsoft was then said to be speeding up development on new The Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo games as it considered restructuring or even spinning off its gaming branch.
paragraphs.cn: 就在上周，新任Xbox负责人Asha Sharma警告公司将进行「重置」，大多数人将此解读为微软计划大规模裁员和关闭工作室的信号。她表示：「最暴露的工作室在声望上无可挑剔，但在电子表格上却一塌糊涂。」随后有消息称，微软正在加速开发新的《上古卷轴》、《辐射》和《光环》游戏，同时考虑重组甚至剥离其游戏部门。

paragraphs.en: Sharma's ground-shaking memo revealed that Microsoft's gaming business currently has a 3% accountability margin (assumed to mean profit margin), which is down year-on-year. "Excluding Activision Blizzard King, over the past five years, we have spent over $20 billion on ongoing investments in our content, platform, and hardware subsidy, but our annual revenue has declined nearly half a billion during that time. Going forward, this cannot continue," Sharma said.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma那份震撼性的备忘录披露，微软游戏业务目前的问责利润率（据推测指净利润率）为3%，同比下降。她说道：「如果不计动视暴雪King，过去五年我们在内容、平台和硬件补贴上的持续投入超过200亿美元(约合人民币1352亿元)，但我们的年收入在此期间却下降了近5亿美元(约合人民币34亿元)。今后，这种情况不能再继续下去。」

paragraphs.en: Following the release of the memo, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella said "there's more monetization of Xbox games happening on YouTube" than at Xbox, adding the Xbox team needed to figure out how to "innovate both in hardware, as well as in the games, going forward in an economically viable way."
paragraphs.cn: 在备忘录发布后，微软CEO萨蒂亚·纳德拉表示，「Xbox游戏在YouTube上的货币化程度比在Xbox上更高」，并补充说Xbox团队需要想办法「以经济可行的方式在硬件和游戏上进行创新」。

paragraphs.en: "No one can accuse Microsoft of not having invested for the last 25 years," Nadella said. "Now, we have to turn this into a sustainable business that delivers what is fundamentally one of the best sources of entertainment, still."
paragraphs.cn: 纳德拉说：「没有人能指责微软过去25年没有投资。现在，我们必须将其变成一项可持续的业务，使其仍能提供根本上最好的娱乐之一。」

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上@wyp100找到他，或通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系，保密邮箱为wyp100@proton.me。
